summary: ANDROID | Log In - When user is Logged out button does not work but user is Logged out
scenario: Tapping Log Out logs the user out but the UI does not update to show the Log In button until the Account tab is re-entered.
description_clean: When the user taps the Log Out button, the button does not respond visually (no action observed), but the user is actually logged out. After re-entering the Account tab, the user is logged out, indicating only the UI is not updating. Expected behavior: tapping Log Out should log the user out and immediately display the Log In button instead of the Log Out button.
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to the Account tab.
3. Observe the visual response of the button after tapping.
4. Check if the user is logged out by navigating away and back to the Account tab.
expected: Tapping Log Out should log the user out and immediately display the Log In button instead of the Log Out button.
actual: The button does not respond visually (no action observed), but the user is actually logged out. After re-entering the Account tab, the user is logged out, indicating only the UI is not updating.
